creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: Having a quick look at the manpage I'd say that its a "primitive" version of handbrake (https://www.freshports.org/multimedia/handbrake/) although in text mode. You can accomplish the functionality by using vapoursynth and/or ffmpeg, ripping DVDs can be done using software such as dvdbackup (https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/dvdbackup/) and VLC although I haven't tried ripping DVDs with either software.
